description: Fragment from a therapeutical work, dealing here with the treatment of the sort of convulsion known as Umm al-Ṣibyān, dysuria and alopecia. Rue cooked in oil is recommended for dysuria, and when topically applied, it is used to treat alopecia. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
